behavior_summary: Responds to a 'U8P_OAR::look' (enterFastArea) event on an OAR instance by preparing and presenting the object's descriptive/info text, then applies exclusion processing.

Selects a specific message/resource id (0x0208), supplies the viewing actor/context and the object reference as parameters to the engine's info-display routine, and then runs exclusion logic to limit or filter propagation of that info.
All behavior is local to the event handler; no global flags are read or written in this script.
notable_control_flow: Push constant message id 0x0208, push caller/actor context (BP+06h), push object reference (indirect at offset 0x02).
Call external routine 'set info' to present/queue the object's descriptive text.
Call external routine 'process exclude' to apply exclusion rules, then return.
open_questions: What exact descriptive text or resource corresponds to message id 0x0208 (the mapping to a concrete string table entry is not present here)?
Precise semantics of 'process exclude' — whether it excludes the object from future processing, filters recipients of the info, or both.
Exact identity/meaning of the BP+06h parameter (caller_actor): appears to be the viewing actor PID or context but that is inferred.
Exact layout and nature of the indirect reference at offset 0x02: appears to be the current object instance pointer/reference but is inferred.

main_function.name: U8P_OAR::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the object's 'U8P_OAR::look' event by selecting and delivering a descriptive/info message (resource 0x0208) to the viewer/context and then applying exclusion logic.
entry_conditions: Event 0: enterFastArea — the actor (player) looks at or inspects this OAR instance.

function_map.name: U8P_OAR::look
function_map.role: Event handler for the object's 'U8P_OAR::look' (enterFastArea) — prepares and delivers descriptive text and runs exclusion processing.

function_map.name: U8P_OAR::set info
function_map.role: Engine routine invoked to display or queue an information/description message (uses message id and context parameters).

function_map.name: U8P_OAR::process exclude
function_map.role: Engine routine invoked after set info to apply exclusion rules (suppresses or manages recipients/propagation).

external_calls.purpose: Deliver or queue the object's descriptive/info text using message id 0x0208 with the viewer/context and object reference as parameters.
Apply exclusion logic after presenting info — likely filters recipients or marks the info as excluded from further processing.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Responds to a 'U8P_OAR::look' (enterFastArea) event on an OAR instance by preparing and presenting the object's descriptive/info text, then applies exclusion processing.
